title: Coolcrete
description: Adds new Coolcrete blocks which look like concrete but act like packed ice making them a good way to make seamless roads of concrete for boats.
body:
![Coolcrete title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2d11fabe32971654e3bc910a74565b4feb1b5906.png)

Coolcrete is a small mod that adds the ability to craft a new type of concrete; coolcrete. Coolcrete looks identitcal to concrete but it is just as slippery as ice is, making it the perfect way to make roads that look like simple concrete.

Make large and expansive roads in the overworld, in the nether or even in the end if you so please. Or if you want something less ambitious simply make a slippery floor somewhere, just make sure to leave a wet floor sign though!
